model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the screen. No specific target element was mentioned, but the image shows a sign-in form. Usually, the main action is "Sign In".

Looking at the image:
- "Welcome back" header
- Email address input field
- Password input field
- "Sign In" button
- "Sign up" link

I will assume the target is the "Sign In" button.
Coordinates for "Sign In" button:
- Left: ~354
- Top: ~621
- Right: ~646
- Bottom: ~683
- Center X: (354 + 646) / 2 = 500
- Center Y: (621 + 683) / 2 = 652
